title: Ecuador vs Curaçao summary: score, stats, goals & highlights | World Cup 2026 Group E

original_text:
Keeper Eloy Room equalled American Tim Howard’s World Cup record of 15 saves, as Curaçao held Ecuador to a goalless draw in Kansas City.

Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Godfried Roemeratoe.

Gervane Kastaneer (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Ángelo Preciado (Ecuador) wins a free kick on the right wing.

Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Armando Obispo.

Substitution, Ecuador. Jordy Caicedo replaces John Yeboah.

Attempt missed. Enner Valencia (Ecuador) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left.

Substitution, Curaçao. Godfried Roemeratoe replaces Livano Comenencia.

Substitution, Curaçao. Gervane Kastaneer replaces Jürgen Locadia because of an injury.

Substitution, Ecuador. Ángelo Preciado replaces Alan Franco.

Delay in match because of an injury Jürgen Locadia (Curaçao).

Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Juriën Gaari.

Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Livano Comenencia.

Attempt saved. Pedro Vite (Ecuador) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top left corner by Eloy Room (Curaçao). Assisted by Kevin Rodríguez.

Attempt saved. Enner Valencia (Ecuador) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Eloy Room (Curaçao). Assisted by Pedro Vite with a cross.

Substitution, Curaçao. Jearl Margaritha replaces Tahith Chong.
